techniques.comment: [Crocodilus](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S9004) has stolen cryptocurrency wallet details from victim devices.(Citation: ThreatFabric_Crocodilus_March2025)(Citation: ThreatFabric_Crocodilus_June2025)
